candidates.notes: Two fresh adversarial searches surfaced only adjacent prior art: GRIN gradient-informed MoE routing (2409.12136), Gradient Routing masking gradients to localize computation (2410.04332), Excitation: Momentum For Experts (2602.21798), the original Expert-Choice Routing (2202.09368), and assorted gradient-sparsification papers (DEFT 2307.03500, Sparse Backpropagation for MoE 2310.00811). None has a title that treats gradient coordinates as tokens routed by an expert-choice mechanism to form an optimizer-agnostic update sparsifier. CONFIRMS AGENT 3: no direct collision.
